overview_table.Features: Collective Force I Rally Confidence Ability Improvement
Rally II Timely Ward Ability Improvement
Ward Reinforcements III Champion Legend Feature
Collective Force II Ward Reinforcements IV
Sanctuary of the Resolved Ability Improvement

features.name: Divine Battlecasting
features.description:
As a Champion, you are able to prepare and cast spells from the Divine spell list:

* **Spells Prepared.** At 1st Rank, you may prepare 4 spells for this Class at the end of each long rest. You may cast those prepared spells using this feature.

* **Class Circle Cap.** Each spell you prepare may have a maximum baseline Circle of 1st Circle.

* **Heightening.** When you cast spells using this feature, you may heighten spells up to your Class Circle Cap.

* **Spell Points.** At 1st Rank, you gain 2 Spell Points. When you cast spells using this feature, you must expend Spell Points equal to the Circle of the spell. Spell Points are regained at the end of each long rest.

* **Spellcasting Modifier.** Your spellcasting modifier when casting spells using this feature is CHA.

  * **Your Spell Attack Bonus** \= your CHA \+ your Tier Bonus

  * **Your Spell Save DC** \= 8 \+ your CHA \+ your Tier Bonus

  * **Spellcasting Checks** made with spells prepared for this class use your CHA.

* **Signature Spell.** Your designated signature spell may be one of the 1st Circle or higher spells prepared for this feature.

* **Higher Ranks.** At higher Ranks, the spells prepared, Spell Points, and Class Circle Cap all improve as described in the Class Overview Table.

features.name: Champion Legend
features.flavor_text: When the world cries out for aid, silently invoking the Legend's name, you take the mantle and carry it forward.
features.description: At 1st Rank, you choose a Champion Legend, a timeless echo of heroes past that you bring to life through your actions. You gain features from your chosen Champion Legend at 1st, 4th, and 8th Rank.

features.name: Rally I
features.flavor_text: An icon rises above the hills. No matter the form of your banner, be it heraldry or metaphor, the faithful gather underneath and take their stand.
features.description:
At 1st Rank, as an action, you may create your *rally*, which is a 10 foot radius sphere. When you create a rally, you choose for it to be placed in either of the below manners:

* **Borne.** The rally originates from your location and moves with you as you move.

* **Planted.** The rally originates from a target surface within 60 feet of you (it does not move). You may not create your rally again unless it is within your Reach.

	You may also take an action to dismiss your rally, and creating a second rally dismisses the previous one.

Your chosen Champion Legend grants additional effects to your rally and provides a list of saving throw types. When an ally makes a listed saving throw while in your rally, they may add \+2 to the total. This \+2 bonus is your *rally bonus*, and it becomes \+3/+4/+5 at 4th/7th/10th Rank, respectively.

features.name: Ward
features.flavor_text: A bond forged in battle, the security of your presence fills your ally with the calm of camaraderie.
features.description:
At 2nd Rank, as an action or as a free action when you take the Raise Shield action, you may *place your ward*, causing a target ally within 60 feet of you to become *warded* until the end of combat or until you place your ward again.

While warded, an ally gains their Half Guard AC. After a warded ally takes damage from an attack, the ward *splinters*, which also ends the ward.

	Lastly, you may take the Raise Shield action even if your fighting style does not have the **Shield-Ready** trait and without needing a shield. If you do, you gain your Half Guard AC from the action regardless of your STR.

features.name: Ward Reinforcements I
features.flavor_text: No matter what, I'm here for you.
features.description:
At 2nd Rank, select one Ward Reinforcement feature of your choosing from the list below, which enhances the capabilities of your **Ward** feature. You may Retrain this feature to redo the selection of all of your chosen Ward Reinforcement features.

### *Affirmation*

## *2nd Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

	As a reaction when an ally warded by you makes a damage roll, you may splinter the ward to add **2d6** to the damage roll. This damage roll bonus becomes 4d6/6d6/8d6 at 4th/7th/10th Rank, respectively.

### *Recuperation*

## *2nd Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

	When your wards splinter, you may cause creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the warded ally to **regain 5 ST**. This ST recovery roll becomes 10/15/20 at 4th/7th/10th Rank, respectively.

### *Sharing*

## *2nd Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

Immediately after you are affected by a spell you cast, you may also cause an ally warded by you to be affected in the same way by the same spell effect.

features.name: Collective Force I
features.description:
At 3rd Rank, once per rest, you may place your ward on your initiative partner as a free action. If you do, you and your initiative partner both gain *collective force* until the end of the current turn.

When a creature with your collective force hits with an attack, they may expend it to add **Xd8 force damage** to the damage roll, where X is your Champion Rank.

features.name: Rally Confidence
features.description: At 3rd Rank, whenever you or an ally adds your rally bonus to a saving throw, they also **regain ST** equal to 3 - your Champion Rank.

features.name: Ability Improvement
features.description:
At 3rd, 6th, 9th, and 12th Rank, you gain an Ability Improvement. Each time you gain an Ability Improvement, distribute three permanent \+1 increases to your ability modifiers. You may increase the same ability modifier multiple times.

The maximum ability modifier that may be achieved is limited by your character's Level. The maximum is \+5 at Level 3, increases to \+6 at Level 6, and finally becomes \+7 at Level 9\.

features.name: Exploration
features.description:
At 4th, 7th, and 10th Rank, you gain an Exploration with Champion being the exploring Class. Each time you gain an Exploration, you gain the following benefit:

* **Bonus Rank.** You choose any Class other than Champion and gain one Rank in the chosen Class.

features.name: Champion Legend Feature
features.description: At 4th Rank, you gain a feature for your Champion Legend.

features.name: Ward Reinforcements II
features.flavor_text: Your allies need you. Every arrow of the enemy you deflect, break, or take yourself is a victory.
features.description:
At 5th Rank, select one of the following Ward Reinforcement features from the list below or one listed at an earlier Rank. During the Retrain downtime activity, you may redo the selection of all of your chosen Ward Reinforcements.

### *Clarity*

## *5th Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

	When you place your ward onto an ally, you may cleanse the warded ally of the disoriented, poisoned, and frightened conditions.

### *Intercession*

## *5th Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

	As an action, you may splinter one of your wards to cause hostile creatures within 10 feet of the warded ally to become provoked by you until the start of your next turn.

### *Preservation*

## *5th Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

	While an ally is warded by you, they have DB 10 against **supernatural damage**. This DB becomes 15/20 at 7th/10th Rank, respectively.

features.name: Rally II
features.flavor_text: Campfire disagreements fade in battle, as all your friends look to you for guidance and inspiration.
features.description:
At 6th Rank, your rally is improved in the following ways:

* **Radius.** The radius of your rally becomes 15 feet.

* **Saving Throw.** You may choose another type of saving throw and append it to the list provided by your Champion Legend. During the Retrain downtime activity, you may redo your selection from this feature.

	The types of saving throws are **Poise**, **Reflex**, **Fortitude**, **Quick-Wits**, **Will**, and **Courage**.

features.name: Timely Ward
features.flavor_text: At the precipice of death, in the moments where it truly matters, your hand is ready to catch them.
features.description: At 6th Rank, as a reaction at any point, you may place your ward.

features.name: Ability Improvement
features.description:
At 6th Rank, you gain an Ability Improvement. Each time you gain an Ability Improvement, distribute three permanent \+1 increases to your ability modifiers. You may increase the same ability modifier multiple times.

The maximum ability modifier that may be achieved is limited by your character's Level. The maximum is \+5 at Level 3, increases to \+6 at Level 6, and finally becomes \+7 at Level 9\.

features.name: Final Stand
features.flavor_text: To get to them, you must go through me.
features.description:
At 7th Rank, once per long rest as an action, you may gain the following benefits until the start of your next turn:

* **In Harm's Way.** All damage dealt to allies within your rally is redirected to you.

* **Endless Resolve.** Burning Resolve does not expend it.

features.name: Exploration
features.description:
At 7th Rank, you gain an Exploration with Champion being the exploring Class. Each time you gain an Exploration, you gain the following benefit:

* **Bonus Rank.** You choose any Class other than Champion and gain one Rank in the chosen Class.

features.name: Ward Reinforcements III
features.flavor_text: The strength of your bond is a fortress built brick by brick, battered by the enemy, but cemented with every deed and word of devotion.
features.description:
At 8th Rank, select one of the following Ward Reinforcement features from the list below or one listed at an earlier Rank. During the Retrain downtime activity, you may redo the selection of all of your chosen Ward Reinforcements.

### *Extrication*

## *8th Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

	When you place your ward onto an ally, they may immediately take the Dodge action as a free action.

### *Immutable*

## *8th Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

	As a free action, you may splinter one of your wards to cleanse the warded ally of the incapacitated, polymorphed, stunned, and unconscious conditions.

### *Justice*

## *8th Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

	When one of your wards splinters, you and the warded ally each gain advantage on your next attack check until the end of your next turn.

features.name: Champion Legend Feature
features.description: At 8th Rank, you gain a feature for your Champion Legend.

features.name: Explosive Ward
features.flavor_text: The shards of faith punish the faithless.
features.description: At 9th Rank, as a free action, you may splinter one of your wards to deal **radiant damage** equal to 2 - your CHA to creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the warded ally.

features.name: Ability Improvement
features.description:
At 9th Rank, you gain an Ability Improvement. Each time you gain an Ability Improvement, distribute three permanent \+1 increases to your ability modifiers. You may increase the same ability modifier multiple times.

The maximum ability modifier that may be achieved is limited by your character's Level. The maximum is \+5 at Level 3, increases to \+6 at Level 6, and finally becomes \+7 at Level 9\.

features.name: Rally III
features.flavor_text: When enemies abound, you carve a path to the heart of their forces and cut it out.
features.description:
At 10th Rank, your rally is improved in the following ways:

* **Radius.** The radius of your rally becomes 20 feet.

* **Relocation.** When your **Planted** rally is within your Reach, you may create your rally as a free action. If you create another **Planted** rally this way, it must be placed away from you further than your Reach.

features.name: Exploration
features.description:
At 10th Rank, you gain an Exploration with Champion being the exploring Class. Each time you gain an Exploration, you gain the following benefit:

* **Bonus Rank.** You choose any Class other than Champion and gain one Rank in the chosen Class.

features.name: Collective Force II
features.flavor_text: Our glorious fate lies before us, awaiting our action and our belief. This is the time to strike true.
features.description: At 11th Rank, immediately before a creature with your collective force makes an attack check, they may expend it to automatically succeed instead of rolling. Expending collective force in this manner does not add **Collective Force's** bonus to the damage roll.

features.name: Ward Reinforcements IV
features.flavor_text: History may remember what we do, but we remember who we do it for.
features.description:
At 11th Rank, select one of the following Ward Reinforcement features from the list below or one listed at an earlier Rank. During the Retrain downtime activity, you may redo the selection of all of your chosen Ward Reinforcements.

### *Aegis*

## *11th Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

	When an ally warded by you is attacked, the attacker must make a **Will** saving throw against your Champion Spell Save DC. On a failure, the attacker must either change the target of the attack or cause the attack to miss.

### *Salvation*

## *11th Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

	When one of your wards splinters, the warded ally **regains 20 ST**. As a free action when this occurs, you may expend 2 Spell Points to convert this ST recovery roll to instead be an HP healing roll.

### *Transcendence*

## *11th Rank Champion Ward Reinforcement*

When you place your ward onto an ally, they may choose either one expended usage of a feature that is normally regained on a short rest, an expended die from a dice pool, or an expended Spell Point, and regain it. Each ally may gain the benefit of **Transcendence** at most once per rest.

features.name: Sanctuary of the Resolved
features.flavor_text: Looking up towards the gleaming standard in your final moments, you watch as the purity of your cause burns to ash amidst the cruelty of your enemies. But a single cinder of hope finds purchase in your heart. Fight for this, one last time.
features.description: At 12th Rank, once per rest as a free action, when an ally in your rally is about to burn a Resolve, you may instead dismiss the rally to grant all allies in your rally the effects of burning a Resolve, except they do not fall prone.

features.name: Ability Improvement
features.description:
At 12th Rank, you gain an Ability Improvement. Each time you gain an Ability Improvement, distribute three permanent \+1 increases to your ability modifiers. You may increase the same ability modifier multiple times.

The maximum ability modifier that may be achieved is limited by your character's Level. The maximum is \+5 at Level 3, increases to \+6 at Level 6, and finally becomes \+7 at Level 9\.

features.name: Final Reach
features.description:
When you reach character Level 12, you compute your *Total Rank*, which is calculated as:

###### The sum of all of your Class Ranks

	If your Total Rank is less than 16 when you reach Level 12, then for each deficient Rank, you may choose one of the benefits below to modify a feature granted by one of your Class Ranks:

* **Maneuvers.** You learn two additional maneuvers.

* **Battlecasting.** You gain a maneuver, an additional Spell Point, and an additional prepared spell for that Class.

* **Spellcasting.** You gain three additional Spell Points and three additional prepared spells for that Class.

Back to Top

# Champion Legends

features.name: Champion Legend: Confidence
features.flavor_text: Sword shaking, the soldier cowers in the face of the endless army. Whispers from behind ripple towards the soldier as ranks part, a hero splitting the river of friendly forces that face the unfriendly sea. Their steady gaze evaluates the enemy and shows no fear; their deliberate advance is an unvoiced challenge to the forces of evil. The drive to overcome grows in lockstep with the hero's footfalls, and as with many great stories in the past, the path to glory is paved with unflinching bravery.
features.description:
## **Distracting Challenge**

	*I'll hold them off\!*

	At 1st Rank, when you hit with a melee attack against a creature, you may cause the target to become provoked by you until the end of combat or after they attack you. While provoked in this manner, a creature gains advantage on attack checks made against you.

## **Audacious Rally**

	*Wherever danger lurks, you are soon to follow. A brilliant glimmer beams from beyond, guiding you to your destiny.*

	At 1st Rank, once per turn when you place your rally and choose for it to be **Planted**, you may add 30 feet to your movement pool for each hostile creature in the rally. This movement may only be spent traveling towards your rally.

	Lastly, your rally bonus may be applied to saving throw types from the following list: **Reflex**, **Courage**. Other features can add saving throw types to this list.

## **Warding Drive**

	*When your foes are on the back foot and are cut down as they threaten your friends, you are staunch in your ability to protect them.*

	At 4th Rank, once per turn when you take the Stagger action, you may place your ward on a target ally within 60 feet of you as a free action.

## **Unbroken**

	*You are invincible by the fact that nothing has stopped you so far.*

	At 8th Rank, you gain the following benefits:

* **All In.** When you place your ward on an ally, they gain advantage on the next attack check they make this turn against a creature that you have provoked from your **Distracting Challenge** feature.

* **Thrill of the Melee.** When you end your turn within your rally, you may **regain ST** equal to 4 - the number of hostile creatures within your rally.

Back to Top

features.name: Champion Legend: Foresight
features.flavor_text: Fruitless debate rages into the late hours of the night, paralyzed by indecision over impossible outcomes. The din of verbal battle is pierced by a single drop of distilled wisdom from the hero. Tirelessly listening, they plot a course through the shifting storm of needs for all parties.  One small choice ignites a guiding star for those who will follow.
features.description:
## **Turn of Fate**

	*In the split second when the tides of battle shift, you see another path.*

	At 1st Rank, as a reaction before a target ally within 60 feet of you takes damage, you may cause the target to **regain Xd6 ST**, where X is  your Tier Bonus.

## **Sheltering Rally**

*The weary need respite, and you are there to provide. An island of safety stands tall and protects those within.*

	At 1st Rank, creatures of your choice within your rally gain DB 5 against damage dealt by subjects outside of your rally. This DB becomes 10/15/20 at 4th/7th/10th Rank, respectively.

Lastly, your rally bonus may be applied to saving throw types from the following list: **Fortitude**, **Quick-Wits**. Other features can add saving throw types to this list.

## **Warding Vigilance**

	*You exist not in the moment but in every moment where you are needed.*

	At 4th Rank, once per turn when you take the Anticipate action, you may place your ward.

## **Safe Harbor**

	*Through expert coordination, rations can turn to plenty. None shall be denied aid as your ranks swell with the desperate.*

	At 8th Rank, you gain the following benefits:

* **No Moment Missed.** You may now use **Turn of Fate** as a reaction at any point targeting an ally within 60 feet of you.

* **Rally to Safety.** As a reaction at the end of any turn, you may cause a target ally within 60 feet of you to travel up to their Speed towards your rally.

Back to Top

features.name: Champion Legend: Tenacity
features.flavor_text: The waters rise as homes are torn into distant memories, trapping a little girl on a shrinking island. When all seems lost, eyes pressed closed in terror, the silent prayers of her ragged voice are answered by steady arms, lifting her above the floodwaters. One safely delivered amongst thousands, the night's work is far from concluded as many more miracles have yet to be wrought.
features.description:
## **Tenacious Barrier**

*Your stubbornness and empathy interlinks into a formidable manifestation, shielding your allies when they are most vulnerable.*

	At 1st Rank, as an action, you may create a *tenacious barrier*, creating a 10 foot square originating from a target location within 30 feet of you oriented in any manner of your choosing. Your tenacious barrier persists until the end of combat or when you create another one. Your tenacious barrier is a translucent obstruction with 10 HP, 10 AC, and 10 Toughness. The Toughness of your tenacious barrier becomes 15/20/25 at 4th/7th/10th Rank, respectively.

## **Stoic Rally**

	*A threadbare standard flutters in the harsh winds and biting rain, defiantly held together by tough seams and faith. It is only over when you give up.*

	At 1st Rank, you and allies in your rally affected by the charmed, grappled, provoked, restrained, slowed, or stuck conditions may treat those conditions as having the **Recoverable** condition trait, allowing an action to end the effect.

Lastly, your rally bonus may be applied to saving throw types from the following list: **Poise**, **Will**. Other features can add saving throw types to this list.

## **Warding Recovery**

	*When they overcome adversity to find their footing, you keep them on their feet.*

	At 4th Rank, once per turn when a condition is removed from an ally within the range of placing your ward, you may place your ward targeting that ally as a free action.

## **Beacon of Safety**

	*We can weather anything, as long as we lend a helping hand.*

	At 8th Rank, you gain the following benefits:

* **Batten the Hatches.** When you create a tenacious barrier, you may have it instead be a 15 foot square originating from a target location within 60 feet of you.

* **Bounce Back.** All conditions now count for your **Stoic Rally** feature.
